dialogos.texto_en: Uwaaa...\nIf this came into my house...
I wouldn't be able to handle it...\nI feel like I'll pass out just from thinking about it.
What are you two so scared of?
Big bro, look at this.\nThere's a HUGE spider.
Apparently it's the biggest spider in Japan,\nand it lives in Okinawa.
Wow, that SURE is a big spider.
Oh, it's big, but it's not particularly venomous.\nSo there's no reason to be scared of.
No, you shouldn't underestimate it.\nIt eats birds that get caught up in its web.
Like the Japanese white-eye, and the Japanese tit!
Spiders eating birds...\nSeriously, that's gross.
I didn't know there were such big insects in Okinawa.
Oh yeah, come to think of it,\nI have the impression that larger insects\nlive in warmer places than in colder places.
Yeah, I would assume insects in tropical jungles are probably really big.
That's like the opposite\nof the so-called Bergmann's rule.
Bergmann?
Oh, you haven't heard of him?
You see, warm-blooded animals can maintain their body\ntemperature more easily, the larger their body size.\nSo in colder regions, their bodies tend to be larger.
This is Bergmann's rule. Even among bears,\nthe polar bear is larger than\nthe Asian black bear that lives in Japan, right?
Yeah, I've seen that in an encyclopedia.
On the other hand, cold-blooded animals like insects\ntend to be smaller in colder regions.\nSo it's like the reverse Bergmann's rule.
I see.\nAs expected of you, Uesugi-kun.\nYou're very knowledgeable.
Heh, it comes in handy to know these things when you're visiting a museum.
However, it might be better to have Miku listen to such stories\nrather than me, don't you think?
...Why are you saying this all of a sudden.
But, what Itsuki-san is saying is true.\nYou should be walking around with Miku-san instead of us.
Miku isn't interested in things like this.
If it's you, Uesugi-kun,\nMiku will happily listen to anything you say.\n...You do understand that, don't you?
(Normally, that would be true...\n But I wonder if that will still be the case\n considering how Miku's acting lately?)
Well, I know that.\nHowever...
What is it?
You saw it too, Itsuki, right?\nFor some reason, Miku's been avoiding me.\nI really want to know the reason.
What's wrong?
Nothing.\nAs long as you continue to try, you will always find an answer.
Well I don't have any other choice, do I?
Teehee, that's right.
Honestly, I really wanna do that too.
Wha...
Ohh!
What's with that reaction?
I mean, it's just that it's rare for you\nto open up to us like this, big bro.
Yes, quite surprising.
It's been bothering you that much, huh?
...I know it's unlike me.
No, you're actually quite honest with yourself.\nYou make us go along with what you want to do.
Itsuki.\nI asked you earlier,\nbut have you remembered anything about Miku since then?
I've been trying to think about it,\nbut I still can't recall anything. Sorry.
Hey, Itsuki.\nDo you have any idea\nwhat might be causing Miku's strange behavior?
Huh?
You guys asked me earlier,\nbut I was wondering if you guys had any leads.
No, not really...\nThat's why I asked you.\nI'm sorry.
No, Itsuki, you don't have to apologize.\nThanks, anyway.
I've also kinda been thinking\nthat Miku-san seems a little off.
You did something, didn't you, big bro?
Unfortunately, I don't remember doing anything\nat all...
